variants: Lachlan Forbes currently resides in Pearlbranch Ridge, having been born in the scenic Harborreed Pointe. A dedicated member of the Grotto Forge Sculptors, he passionately engages in sculpting and artistic endeavors. His innovation in the field is exemplified by his authored work, Silverline Array Builder, which has garnered attention in artistic circles. In recognition of his significant contributions, Lachlan was honored with the Gemstone Pavilion Distinction, cementing his reputation as a talented creator within the community.
